sentences.sentence: Paint supplies are located in aisle three.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (paint, three)

sentences.sentence: Please grab a basket by the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: basic vowel distinctions (grab, door)

sentences.sentence: We can cut lumber to size at the wood counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (wood counter)

sentences.sentence: Extra keys are cut at the service desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-str- in extra) and compound noun stress (service desk)

sentences.sentence: Paint samples can be mixed while you wait nearby.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (can_be mixed)

sentences.sentence: Power tools are stored along the back wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ls, -rd) and compound noun stress (power tools)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find a particular item, check the store directory posted near the main aisle.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if you_cannot) and stress-timing over a long sentence

sentences.sentence: Lockers are located beside the main entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (lockers, main)

sentences.sentence: Free weights can be found in the back room.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (back room) and linking (can_be found)

sentences.sentence: Towel service is included with your membership card.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (is_included) and compound noun stress (membership card)

sentences.sentence: Group fitness classes run through the afternoon each weekday.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (run_through) and reduced syllables (afternoon)

sentences.sentence: Treadmills and rowing machines line the upstairs studio.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (treadmills, -rs in upstairs)

sentences.sentence: Personal training sessions can be booked at the front desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (front desk) and linking (can_be booked)

sentences.sentence: If you are new to the equipment, check the schedule posted by the entrance for open orientation times.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if you_are) and final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (times)

sentences.sentence: Safety goggles are kept by the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (kept, door)

sentences.sentence: Please tie back long hair.
sentences.phonetic_focus: basic vowel distinctions (tie, long)

sentences.sentence: The eyewash station is over here.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (eyewash station)

sentences.sentence: Lab coats must be worn during every experiment.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (lab coats) and reduced syllables (experiment)

sentences.sentence: Chemical waste is collected in the labeled containers.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (is_collected) and consonant clusters (labeled)

sentences.sentence: First aid kits are mounted near the sinks.
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters (kits, sinks) and compound noun stress (first aid kits)

sentences.sentence: If you spill any chemical, locate the emergency shower marked on the wall near the exit.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if you_spill) and stress-timing over a long sentence
